tool_args.raw_text: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS - May 2025 - mta.info

tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North Railroad is comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

payload.description: Metro-North Railroad is comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road
tool_args.raw_text: Long Island Rail Road is comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

payload.description: Long Island Rail Road is comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

tool_args.label: Justin Vonashek, President, Metro-North Railroad
tool_args.raw_text: Justin Vonashek President, Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: MTA Construction & Development
tool_args.raw_text: In partnership with MTA Construction & Development, Metro-North is advancing a major accessibility initiative at three Harlem Line stations in the Bronx

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)
tool_args.raw_text: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

payload.description: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

tool_args.label: Bronx Station ADA Upgrades - Harlem Line
tool_args.raw_text: In partnership with MTA Construction & Development, Metro-North is advancing a major accessibility initiative at three Harlem Line stations in the Bronx, with comprehensive ADA upgrades planned for Botanical Garden, Williams Bridge, and Woodlawn. Beginning in the second quarter of 2025 and continuing through 2027, this project will modernize station infrastructure with new elevators, ramps, stairways, and platforms, ensuring full ADA compliance and an improved customer experience.

payload.description: Major accessibility initiative at three Harlem Line stations in the Bronx, with comprehensive ADA upgrades planned for Botanical Garden, Williams Bridge, and Woodlawn. Includes new elevators, ramps, stairways, and platforms.

warnings: project.lead_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Lead agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.
project.partner_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Partner agency is relation context. Suggested relation: has_partner.

tool_args.label: Hudson Line Slope Stabilization
tool_args.raw_text: This month, Construction & Development is advancing design for the Hudson Line Slope Stabilization project, which was awarded in March 2025. This project focuses on fortifying the slopes that sit above Metro-North train tracks to prevent debris and soil from washing onto the rails during heavy rainfall. ... The project encompasses the design of permanent slope stabilization and stormwater drainage improvements on and off Metro-North property between mileposts 16.6 and 17.4 on the Hudson Line in Yonkers.

payload.description: Fortifying slopes above Metro-North train tracks to prevent debris and soil from washing onto rails during heavy rainfall. Encompasses design of permanent slope stabilization and stormwater drainage improvements between mileposts 16.6 and 17.4 on the Hudson Line in Yonkers. Includes structural repairs to retaining walls, hydraulic improvements to two undergrade bridges, track and outfall drainage improvements, and rip-rap fortification along the shoreline.
payload.location: Yonkers, between Graystone and Riverdale stations on Hudson Line

location_normalized.raw_text: Yonkers, between Graystone and Riverdale stations on Hudson Line

warnings: project.lead_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Lead agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Babylon Station Platform Replacement / ADA Package 2
tool_args.raw_text: This month, MTA Construction and LIRR are completing the first phase of platform replacement at Babylon Station, which is one of the three stations receiving accessibility upgrades as part of ADA Package 2. ... The project is on schedule to meet its first milestone by opening back up the full 12-car platform by the end of May, in time for summer service.

payload.description: ADA Package 2 project at Babylon Station, a major hub of the Babylon Branch. Platform replacement with pre-cast concrete slabs, two new elevators, replacement of two existing escalators, a boiler room, plaza upgrades, new automated snow and ice melting system, new canopies, new LED lighting, and an AV paging system.
payload.status: First phase completing May 2025; east end closure after Labor Day

warnings: project.lead_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Lead agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: New Haven Line Super Express Trains
tool_args.raw_text: On March 30, we launched our fastest-ever Super Express trains on the New Haven Line, improving travel times between New Haven, Bridgeport, and Grand Central Terminal by up to 10 minutes.

payload.project_name: Super Express Trains on New Haven Line
payload.description: Launch of fastest-ever Super Express trains on the New Haven Line, improving travel times between New Haven, Bridgeport, and Grand Central Terminal by up to 10 minutes.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Virtual Reality Training Program
tool_args.raw_text: Virtual Reality (VR) Training is now in full rollout at Metro-North. Developed almost entirely in-house by our Operations Training Department, this initiative features immersive modules on topics such as the Train Approach Warning System and Customer Interaction De-escalation.

payload.description: VR Training program developed almost entirely in-house by Metro-North's Operations Training Department. Features immersive modules on Train Approach Warning System and Customer Interaction De-escalation. Since January 2025, trained more than 275 employees.

tool_args.label: Super Express Train Launch - New Haven Line
tool_args.raw_text: On March 30, we launched our fastest-ever Super Express trains on the New Haven Line

payload.description: Launch of fastest-ever Super Express trains on New Haven Line

tool_args.label: Weekend Ferry Service Returns - Haverstraw to Ossining
tool_args.raw_text: Weekend ferry service returns this summer and fall between Haverstraw and Ossining. ... weekend ferry operations resumed on Saturday, May 24, and will continue through Sunday, October 12.

payload.description: Weekend ferry service returns between Haverstraw and Ossining, operating 9.5 hours each Saturday and Sunday from 10am to 7:30pm through October 12

tool_args.label: Connect with Us event at Cortlandt Station
tool_args.raw_text: On Thursday, May 15, we held our first Connect with Us event of 2025 at Cortlandt Station on the Hudson Line

payload.description: First Connect with Us event of 2025 at Cortlandt Station on the Hudson Line

tool_args.label: Safety Focus Day - Prepared to Perform
tool_args.raw_text: On May 1, Safety Focus Day returned with an invigorated approach

payload.description: Safety Focus Day with theme 'Prepared to Perform', focused on Hazards, Mental Fatigue, Slip Trip and Fall Prevention, and PPE Compliance

tool_args.label: LIRR Summer Timetables Effective
tool_args.raw_text: On May 19, our annual summer timetables went into effect to enhance service for the warm weather months

payload.description: Annual summer timetables went into effect for LIRR

tool_args.label: First Thursday Cannonball 2025 Season
tool_args.raw_text: Later that week, I had the pleasure of seeing-off our first Thursday Cannonball of the season, meeting and greeting customers prior to the departure of the 4:07 pm from Penn to Montauk as our official kick-off to our summer travel season.

payload.description: First Thursday Cannonball of the season departed 4:07pm from Penn Station to Montauk

tool_args.label: Babylon Station West End Opens
tool_args.raw_text: The brand new west end of the station opened to passenger service on Sunday, May 18

payload.description: New west end of Babylon Station opened to passenger service, allowing 12-car trains for summer season

tool_args.label: Mets Home Opener LIRR Record Ridership
tool_args.raw_text: Baseball is back and when the Mets held their home opener on Friday, April 4, we transported 7,190 fans to the game - a record for Mets LIRR Opening Day ridership, topping last year's total by some 2,200 fans.

payload.description: LIRR transported 7,190 fans to Mets home opener, a record for Mets LIRR Opening Day ridership

tool_args.label: Metro-North April 2025 total ridership
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North's total April 2025 ridership of 6.04 million increased 4.9% from March

tool_args.label: Metro-North April 2025 vs April 2024 change
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North's total ridership in April increased 8.1% compared to April 2024 and represents 81.2% of April 2019 ridership

tool_args.raw_text: average weekday ridership increased 4.7% to 226,711

tool_args.label: Metro-North April 2025 average weekend ridership
tool_args.raw_text: average weekend ridership increased 6.7% to 109,461

tool_args.label: Metro-North March 2025 MDBF
tool_args.raw_text: the fleet's mean distance between failures (MDBF) in March was 370,198 miles, surpassing the 200,000-mile goal

tool_args.label: Metro-North April 2025 systemwide OTP
tool_args.raw_text: Systemwide on-time performance (OTP) exceeded the 94% goal, reaching 98.3%

tool_args.label: Metro-North April 2025 service delivered
tool_args.raw_text: Service delivered in April was 99.9%

tool_args.label: LIRR April 2025 total ridership
tool_args.raw_text: April ridership remained strong at 6.8 million customers, increasing 11.6% compared to April 2024

tool_args.label: LIRR April 2025 on-time performance
tool_args.raw_text: we achieved our second best April total performance ever with a 97.08% OTP

tool_args.label: LIRR best post-COVID Friday ridership
tool_args.raw_text: May 16 was also our best post-COVID Friday (as of 5/22) with 273,352 customers using the LIRR that day

tool_args.label: LIRR highest one-day ridership since COVID
tool_args.raw_text: we achieved our highest one-day ridership since COVID on Tuesday, May 20 with 285,050 customers

tool_args.label: Bronx stations double-digit ridership growth since pre-COVID
tool_args.raw_text: Seven Bronx stations are showing double-digit percentage increases in ridership since before COVID: Tremont +166%, Melrose +107%, Morris Heights +61%, Botanical Garden +31%, Fordham +23%, Williams Bridge +18%, University Heights +13%

payload.claim_text: Seven Bronx stations are showing double-digit percentage increases in ridership since before COVID: Tremont +166%, Melrose +107%, Morris Heights +61%, Botanical Garden +31%, Fordham +23%, Williams Bridge +18%, University Heights +13%
